seoTitle: Mayfield vs Mayfield North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mayfield and Mayfield North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mayfield vs Mayfield North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mayfield and Mayfield North.
heading: Mayfield vs Mayfield North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mayfield, New South Wales and Mayfield North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mayfield North has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mayfield (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mayfield or Mayfield North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mayfield has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Mayfield North scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mayfield scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Mayfield North scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mayfield or Mayfield North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mayfield North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
